app.rdg: 1. Abil gwat kretia okudad ku Lokaristi gula stab ku obokred?
1. ʔəbilʼ gʷat kretia ʔukʷədad kʷi Lokaristi gʷəl stab kʷi ʔubəqʼəd.
1. when someone Christian take the eucharist then what the ingest
1. How do Christians take the eucharist and what do they ingest?
Abil gwat kretia okudad ku Lokaristi gula obokred ku Shesu-Kri rlhte satled dhual ku seles.
ʔəbilʼ gʷat kretia ʔukʷədad kʷi lokaristi gʷəl ʔubəqʼəd kʷi Shesu-Kri x̌əɬ ti sʔəɬəd dxʷʔal kʷi shəliʔs.
when some Christian take the eucharist then eat the Jesus Christ as_if the food unto their souls
The way Christians take the eucharist is to eat Jesus Christ as though food unto their souls.
2. Asared kwi tla adskwebitsut dhual kwi tla adskudad ku Shesu-Kri?
2. ʔəsʔəx̌id kʷi ɬuadsqʷibicut dxʷʔal kʷi ɬuadskʷadad kʷi Shesu-Kri.
2. how the prepare+self unto the partake the Jesus_Christ
2. How do you prepare yourself to partake of Jesus Christ?
Abil aku dtskwadad al ku drech ched tla or dhual rarasmilalam,
ʔəbilʼ ʔaʔ kʷi ddᶻəkʼʷadad ʔal kʷi dx̌əč čəd ɬuʔux̌ʷ dxʷʔal x̌ax̌a sbilʼʔallaʔəb.
perhaps be the sin on the mind I go unto holy confession
If I have sins on my mind I will go to confession.
ched tla absh ti drech dhual Shesu-Kri, ched tla whe la atled tolal ku chergwas, ched tla hoyud halh ta dsokwab.
čəd ɬuʔahabš ti dx̌əč dxʷʔal Shesu-Kri, čəd ɬuxʷiʔ ləʔəƛ'əd tulʼʔal kʷi čəgʷas, čəd ɬuhuyud haʔl tə dc̕ukʼʷəb.
I have the mind upon Jesus_Christ, I not go toward the wife, I make good the body
I will have my mind on Jesus Christ, I will not come unto my wife, I will make my body good.
3. Aschal kwi tla adsgwadgwad zihubid a kwi tla adskudad ku Shesu-Kri?
3. ʔəsčal kʷi ɬ(u)adsgʷadgʷad dᶻixʷbid ʔə kʷi ɬuadskʷadad kʷi Shesu-Kri.
3. how the speak first of the partake the Jesus_Christ
3. How will you speak first of partaking of Jesus Christ?
Zihubid aku tlo dskudad ku Shesu-Kri ku tlo ds'tewielh aku tlehu.
dᶻixʷbid ʔə kʷi ɬudskʷadad kʷi Shesu-Kri kʷi ɬudstʼiwiɬ ʔə kʷi ɬixʷ.
first of the partake the Jesus Christ the pray of the three
First when I partake of Jesus Christ I pray three times.
(See Acts before Communion page 13.)
(See Acts before Communion page 13.)
(See Acts before Communion page 13.)
4. Asared kwi tlo adalalus aku tla adskudad ku Shesu-Kri?
4. ʔəsʔəx̌id kʷi ɬuadʔalalus ʔə kʷi ɬuadskʷadad kʷi Shesu-Kri.
4. how the behave of the partake the Jesus_Christ
4. How will you behave when you partake of Jesus Christ?
Tlo orched dhual gwalh Lokaristi latam ched tla rwelch,
ɬuʔux̌ʷ čəd dxʷʔal gʷəɬ lokaristi latam čəd ɬux̌ʷilič,
go I unto belonging_to eucharist table I kneel
I will go to the eucharist table and I will kneel,
ched tla kudad tihîlh sil ata sale dchalas,
čəd ɬukʷədad tiʔiɬ sil ʔə tə saliʔ dčaləs,
I take the sil??? of the two hand
I will take the chalice? with both hands,
ched tla tlarad al ta dsgwedayutsid,
čəd ɬuɬəx̌əd ʔal tə dsgʷədayucid,
I will spread out with my chin,
gula al tihîlh ched tla abietob aku leple aku Lokaristi,
gʷəl ʔal tiʔiɬ čəd ɬuʔabyitəb ʔə kʷi ləplə ʔə kʷi lokaristi,
then I will receive the eucharist from the priest,
ched tla dahu shishkrosob, ched tla sheshuts,
čəd ɬudəxʷ šišqusəb, čəd ɬu šišuuc,
I will lift up my face a little, I will look briefly/modestly/humbly,
ched tla kahades, ched tla tlalksheb;
čəd ɬukahədus, čəd ɬuɬalqsəb;
I open=mouth I park=end
I open my mouth, I stick out my tongue,
tlo a hahu al ku detlalap ku loste, ched tla bokred.
ɬuʔahəxʷ ʔal kʷi dɬalap kʷi loste, čəd ɬubəqʼəd.
there on the tongue the Host(fr=hostie), I eat
there will be on my tongue the Host, I will eat it.
5. Aschal kwi tla adsgwagwad dhual Shesu-Kri, al ku tlsasbechsahu al dgwe?
5. ʔəsčal kʷi ɬadsgʷagʷad dxʷʔal Shesu-Kri, ʔal kʷi ɬ(u)səsbəčəxʷ ʔal dəgʷiʔ
5. How will you talk to Jesus Christ, ?????
Tlo gwadgwadched aku gwalh ador siayus,
ɬugʷadgʷadčəd ʔə kʷi gʷəɬ ador siayus,
I will speak of works of worship,
tlhba gwadgwadched aku gwalh masi siayus,
ɬubəgʷadgʷadčəd ʔə kʷi gʷəɬ masi syayus,
I will be speaking of works of mercy,
tlhba gwadgwadched aku gwalh stehech siayus. (See page 13.)
ɬubəgʷadgʷadčəd ʔə kʷi gʷəl stihič siayus. (See page 13.)
I will be speaking of works of beseeching.
6. Stab kwi tla adsiayus tolal ku tla adskudad ku Shesu-Kri ?
6. stab kʷi ɬ(u)adsyayus tulʼʔal kʷi ɬ(u)adskʷədad kʷi Shesu-Kri.
6. what the work until the partake the Jesus_Christ
6. What will be your works until you partake of Jesus Christ?
Tolal ku tlo dskudad ku Shesu-Kri tskwakredched tla aslardhu tsid^ilh,
tulʼʔal kʷi ɬ(u)dskʷədad kʷi Shesu-Kri ckʼʷaqid čəd ɬuʔəslax̌dxʷ cidiɬ,
until the partake the Jesus_Christ always I remember that
Until I partake of Jesus Christ I will always remember Him,
tskwakredched tla asra'tleldhu tsidîlh, gula halh kwi tsashutsbitsut.
ckʼʷaqid čəd ɬuʔəsx̌aƛ'ildxʷ cidiɬ, gʷəl haʔɬ kʷi dsəshuyucbicut.
always I love that then good the keep+myself
always will I love Him, and I will keep myself good.
